description: This file contains test cases for a set of SCSS mixins related to utility class generation, including handling of properties, states, CSS variables, RTL support, RFS (responsive font sizing), and infix insertion. It uses a testing framework with custom mixins like 'describe', 'it', and 'test-generate-utility' to verify the behavior of utility class generation functions.

methods.name: test-generate-utility
methods.description: A test helper mixin that wraps the generate-utility call with assertions and expected content checks.
